✦ Who I Am

Curious. Creative.
Always Building.

I'm a 2nd year Computer Science student at Sathyabama Institute of Science and Technology, Chennai, with a CGPA of 9.05. I don't just stay in the coding bubble — I think about how technology, business, and people connect.

From building end-to-end ML dashboards to organising college events, I bring both technical skills and people skills to everything I do. I've completed a business analytics internship, earned an NPTEL Elite cert from IIT Madras, and finished IBM SkillsBuild's Agentic AI program.

I'm drawn to roles where data meets decisions — product analytics, AI-driven tools, and anything that creates real impact.

✦ What I've Built

Featured
Projects

Machine Learning

ChurnGuard Analytics

An end-to-end ML dashboard predicting SaaS customer churn. Compares Logistic Regression, Random Forest & XGBoost with an 80/20 train-test split. Features a live risk gauge, feature importance charts, ROC curves, and revenue impact analysis.

PythonScikit-learnStreamlitPlotlyXGBoost
🚀 Live Demo ↗ 📂 GitHub ↗
Web Development

Personal Portfolio Website

A fully responsive personal portfolio with smooth scroll animations, a soft pastel aesthetic and clean typography. Showcases projects, events, and achievements. Won 1st place in the intra-college website making competition at Sathyabama.

HTMLCSSJavaScriptResponsive Design
